title: Aama Bhitare Kichhi Achhi
overview: Aama Bhitare Kichhi Achhi is a 2010 Odia romantic film starring Anubhav Mohanty and Varsha Priyadarshini. Sid and Shraddha are introduced by their families but the couple oppose the idea of having an arranged marriage and decide to remain friends. Will the friendship turn into love?
